title: RediClient
description: A lightweight client-side Fabric modpack for Minecraft, made for SMPs and creative play
body:
# RediClient

Welcome to RediClient, a small client-side modpack to improve your Minecraft Experience on SMPs and Creative Mode projects!

## 🌟 RediClient at a Glance

🛡️ **Client-side Only** – No server installation needed!  
⚡ **Performance Boost** – Smoother gameplay with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore & more  
🎨 **Visual Upgrades** – Iris shaders, Continuity, 3D Skins, Blur+, Cull Leaves  
🛠️ **Quality of Life** – AppleSkin, Better Advancements, Mouse Tweaks, Mod Menu  
🔧 **Utility Tools** – Replay Mod, Carpet Mod, Command Block IDE, NBT Autocomplete  
🏗️ **Builder’s Toolkit** – Litematica, Litematica Printer, SchematicPreview, Hold Easy Place  
💬 **Multiplayer Ready** – ViaFabricPlus, Fast IP Ping, Chat Heads, Compact Chat  
🔒 **Vanilla Friendly** – No new blocks or items—just client-side enhancements  
⚠️ **Anticheat Warning** – Some mods (like Tweakeroo, ViaFabricPlus) may trigger bans on strict servers. Please refer to the "Warning" section.

## **What Does RediClient Add?**

RediClient is a carefully curated client-side modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience on Survival Multiplayer (SMP) servers without altering core gameplay or requiring server-side installation. It brings together a wide range of quality-of-life improvements, visual enhancements, performance optimizations, and advanced utility tools — all while keeping the vanilla spirit intact.

### **Key Features**

- **Performance & Optimization:**  
  Enjoy smoother gameplay with mods like Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Dynamic FPS, which significantly boost frame rates and reduce lag, even on lower-end systems.

- **Visual Enhancements:**  
  Experience a more immersive world with Iris (shader support), Continuity (seamless connected textures), 3D Skin Layers, Blur+, and Cull Leaves for a cleaner, more vibrant look.

- **Quality of Life Improvements:**  
  Streamline your gameplay with AppleSkin (food info), Better Advancements, Better Statistics Screen, Mouse Tweaks, Mod Menu, and Clean Tooltips. Enjoy easier inventory management, improved HUDs, and more informative tooltips.

- **Builder & Creative Tools:**  
  Easily plan, preview, and construct large builds with Litematica, Litemoretica, Litematica Printer, SchematicPreview and Technical Utilities - perfect for technical players and creative projects.

- **Advanced Utility Tools:**  
  Take advantage of powerful tools like Replay Mod for recording gameplay, Carpet Mod for advanced world manipulation (if enabled), Command Block IDE, and NBT Autocomplete for creators and technical players.

- **Multiplayer-Ready:**  
  RediClient is built for multiplayer environments. Mods like ViaFabricPlus and Fast IP Ping help you connect to a wider range of servers, while Chat Heads, Compact Chat, and Better Ping Display enhance your communication.

- **Safe, Client-Side Only:**  
  All mods are client-side, meaning you can join almost any server without compatibility issues. However, some mods (like Tweakeroo and ViaFabricPlus) may trigger server anticheat systems - see the warning section for details.

### **Why Choose RediClient?**

RediClient is for players who want:
- A faster, more stable Minecraft experience.
- Visual upgrades and modern features without losing the vanilla feel.
- Powerful tools for builders, technical players, and content creators.
- A modpack that works out-of-the-box on most SMP servers, with the flexibility to disable advanced mods as needed.

Whether you’re a builder, redstone engineer, explorer, or casual player, RediClient gives you the tools to make Minecraft smoother, prettier, and more enjoyable - without the bloat or complexity of larger packs.

## Where can I use this?
You can use this anywhere! Feel free to customize RediClient to fit your playstyle.

## Warning
This modpack features mods like Tweakeroo and ViaFabricPlus, which means playing on servers with strong anticheat may result in a ban. It is recommended to disable these mods before playing on such a server.

### Notable mods:
- Mouse Tweaks
- Tweakeroo
- ViaFabricPlus
- Litematica, Litemoretica, Litematica Printer, SchematicPreview, and Technical Utilities
